title: hesperis fragrans
intro: Hesperis fragrans, also known as Sweet Rocket or Dame's Rocket, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and antibacterial qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of Hesperis fragrans include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
